title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nivea India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nivea India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Nivea India in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nivea India:
Nivea India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nivea India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
